_comment: TESTNET GENESIS TEMPLATE — every address below is a TODO placeholder. Fill in real bucket-recipient addresses before pointing a node at this file. The plugin's safety check (config.go::SafetyCheck) refuses to start under profile="testnet" or "mainnet" if any recipient still matches the localnet placeholder (851e90eaef1fa27debaee2c2591503bdeec1d123); the addresses below are pre-distinct so the check passes, but they still must be replaced.

params._comment: Fill in the real testnet multisig signer addresses before deploy. Threshold of 3 is the default and matches the bundled five-signer pattern; raise it if you list more signers.

_validatorRegistryComment: Seed the canoLiq committee validator set so the per-validator pro-rata reward distribution is honest from block 1. Replace each address with a real opted-in validator's account address (matches Canopy's Validator.Address). Stake should mirror that validator's StakedAmount in uCNPY-equivalent. Leaving validatorRegistry empty falls back to a single committee aggregator key — fine for bring-up but obscures per-validator credit.
